name: PT Logindo Samudramakmur Tbk.
summary: PT Logindo Samudramakmur Tbk., together with its subsidiaries, provides integrated maritime services to support upstream oil and gas industries in Indonesia. It provides offshore support vessel services, including anchor handling tugs and anchor handling supply vessels, platform supply vessels, diving support and utility vessels, crew boats, patrol boats, landing craft tanks, tug boats, barges, and accommodation work barges. The company operates a fleet of 45 vessels. PT Logindo Samudramakmur Tbk. was founded in 1995 and is based in Central Jakarta, Indonesia.
